# PLAYREADYSPORTS

PLAYREADYSPORTS is a football match platform in Ghana for finding pickup matches, joining local games, booking pitches, and discovering football tournaments.

## What PLAYREADYSPORTS offers
- Join football matches near you
- Create and host football games
- Book real pitches and venues
- Discover local football tournaments
- Connect with footballers and teams across Ghana

## Brand and keywords
- Brand: PLAYREADYSPORTS
- Also known as: PlayReady Sports, Play Ready, Play Ready Sports GH
- Search phrases: join play ready, join play, play ready sports gh, football matches Ghana, pickup football Accra

## Main site
- https://joinplayready.com/
- https://joinplayready.com/join
- https://joinplayready.com/create
- https://joinplayready.com/schedule

## Summary
PLAYREADYSPORTS helps footballers in Ghana find matches, join sessions, book pitches, and build community through local football events.

## Team
- Founder: William Cosmas-Gonzalves
- Lead Developer: Kwarteng Kwame Acheampong - Built the platform, web app, and core features.
